question: HU SRP, SB IP, 60bb, pot 8.4bb on K72r-5x after flop bet-call. Choose turn size.
rationale: Turn adds equity and favors IP; 50% sets river geometry without overcommitting.
lesson_goal: Goal: Hu Turn Play Drill 001 Module.

question: HU SRP, SB IP, 70bb, pot 8.4bb on K72r-2x brick. With KJ no backdoors. Line?
rationale: Brick does not help range; protect value and realize by delaying turn bet.
